Menu | NFA Burger - Dunwoody | Voted Best Burger in Georgia in 2021
Skip to content
at NFA
Burgers
Double - The Classic
$9.00
Two 2.75 oz patties, Mt. Olive pickles, American cheese, French's mustard, Sassy Sauce on a Martin's Potato Roll.

$5.75

Customize with our wide variety of toppings.

Jersey Dog

Customize with our wide variety of toppings.
Pictured with Sassy Sauce, mustard and diced pickles.

SIDES
Sassy Tots
$4.50
Deep fried in beef tallow and served with Sassy Sauce on the side.
Sassy Fries
$4.50
Thin crinkle cut fries deep fried in beef tallow with a dusting of Sassy seasoning and served with Sassy Sauce on the side.
SWEETS - Avalon
Waffles by Belgium
Our Liege Waffles are flown in from Belgium and they're AMAZING. Complete with Pearl Sugar, you can add chocolate, caramel or strawberry.
Sauce is served on the side.
One
$4.00
Two
$7.00
SWEETS - Dunwoody
Schmoops by Jules
$3.50
Our house made cinnamon sugar twists are pretty schmoopie!
Waffles by Belgium
Our Liege Waffles are flown in from Belgium and they're AMAZING. Complete with Pearl Sugar, you can add chocolate, caramel or strawberry.
Sauce is served on the side.

About Ketchup
We'll add ketchup to any sandwich for $1 million...we'll put it on the side for free.
